properties.Test Case: Add music to xmatter pages. If you can add it then it should play and stay there on exit and restart

properties.Test Case: Try out all options of No Music, Continue Music, and Start new music in a single book. Preview in BR.

properties.Test Case: In Bloom Reader preview, ensure the pause button remains for all pages which have music playing, and not show where there is no music playing.
properties.Steps: In Bloom Reader preview, ensure the pause button remains for all pages which have music playing, and not show where there is no music playing.

properties.Test Case: Volume control should control relative volume compared to narration. Clicking anywhere on the slider should stick the volume level where you click and not exhibit any slide to the left or right.
